NOTMCATION I New Delhi, the 12th July, 2007 ' G.S.R. 482(E).— In exercise of the powers confetred by Sub-section (1) of Sectio: 1 22, of the Cable Television Nelw )rks (Regulation) Act, 1995 (7 of 1995), the Central Government hereby m ^ s the follov ing rules further to amend the Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994, namely:— j ^ i 1. (1) These rules may be called the Cable Television Networks (Second Amendment) Rules, 2007. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazejtte. 2, In the Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994, in rule 6, in Sub-rule (6), for th|s first proviso, the following proviso shall be substituted, namely :— “Provided that a Cable Operator may continue to carry or include in his cjable service any Television broadcast or channel, whose application for registration to the Central Govenjment was made on or before 11th May, 2006 and is under consideration, for a period upto 10th August, 20(|7 or till such registration has been granted or refused, whichever is earlier.”. : [F.No.l601^1/2006-TV(I)] z 4 h RA CHAITERJI, Jt. Secy.
